title: Intricately Fried Egyptian Fruit Mix Fritters
description: A citrusy and tender Egyptian dish featuring a mix of fruits, fried to perfection, and vegan-friendly. This monsoon-inspired treat is perfect for a sweet and satisfying snack.

ingredients.name: mixed fruit
ingredients.notes: such as pineapple, apple, and banana

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and cornstarch.
Add the orange and lemon juice to the bowl and stir until a smooth batter forms.
Fold in the mixed fruit and sugar until well combined.
Heat the coconut oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy!
Optional: dust with powdered sugar before serving.
